title: selenipedium × calurum
intro: Selenipedium × calurum is a rare hybrid orchid plant, resulting from the cross between Selenipedium palmifolium and Cypripedium calceolus. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which are primarily attributed to its alkaloid content, including selenipediumine and calceolusine. The health benefits of Selenipedium × calurum are said to include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its possible applications in the treatment of various ailments such as fever and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying and grinding the roots, which can then be used to create teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
